content:
Hi Maria

Thunderbird for Android doesn't have its own address book. It reads from your default contacts app. You may be able to restore contacts from a google backup if enabled. See below. https://support.google.com/android/answer/12761392?hl=en

If your having an issue seeing contacts in Thunderbird for Android... 1. Long press the Thunderbird launcher icon > app info > permissions 2. Check / grant permission to read your contacts.
creator: platform34

content: To remove an account ... Navigate to settings > account > 3dot menu > remove account.
